title: Indulgent Citrusy Korean Tagliatelle
description: A tender and indulgent Korean dish featuring tagliatelle, tempered chocolate, and citrus flavors. Perfect for a weeknight dinner meal.
instructions: In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook the tagliatelle according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the pan and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the gochujang, lemon juice, and lime juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in the dark chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
Toss the cooked tagliatelle in the sauce until well coated.
Season with salt and crushed red pepper flakes to taste.
Transfer the tagliatelle to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions.
Tempering the chocolate can be done by heating it in a double boiler or in a heatproof bowl set over a pot of simmering water, stirring constantly until smooth and melted.
